calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Vacating Stay Of Enforcement Of Judgment Due To Default Of Defendant, James Darin Triplett
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEQUOIA CONCEPTS INC.'S Motion For Order Vacating Stay Of Enforcement Of Judgment Due To Default Of Defendant, James Darin Triplett is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
